workflow.name: Send a daily media briefing email with GPT-4.1-mini, NewsAPI, Gmail and Google Sheets
workflow.description: This workflow creates a daily media briefing based on public news sources. It retrieves relevant articles, summarizes key coverage, evaluates sentiment, and compares the current media volume against historical data. If an unusual spike in coverage is detected, the agent autonomously performs additional research and highlights the anomaly in the briefing. The result is sent as a structured HTML email, ready for executive consumption.

parameters.text:
=You are a media relations analyst. Prepare a concise media briefing based on the latest coverage of: "{{ $('Set user config').item.json.query }}" You will receive {{ $('Fetch news articles').item.json.totalResults }} articles in the end of this instruction. From this data, select the 10 most relevant and impactful for the topic above. **ANOMALY DETECTION:** If you detect an anomaly based on historic volume seen here {{ $('Get historic values from Google Sheets').item.json.history }}, decide the most fitting keyword and use the "Topic research" tool where you use this URL (replace KEYWORD): https://newsapi.org/v2/everything?q=KEYWORD&from={{ $('Set timeframe to last 2 days').item.json.newDate }}&sortBy=relevancy&apiKey=719937591fcb4c5986426a3a9d9dac6b Then explain which keyword you researched and present your findings in the anomaly section. If you didn't research an anomaly, mention this briefly in a sentence. But in the top 10 articles, only list the ones from the data in the end. **HTML OUTPUT FORMAT:** Use proper HTML formatting for email. Structure your response as follows:

📰 Personal Media Briefing – {{ $('Trigger daily').item.json['Readable date'] }}

Executive Overview

[1 short paragraph summarizing the overall trend or narrative]

Top Articles

For each of the selected articles, format as:

[Article Headline] [SENTIMENT_DOT]

[1-sentence summary]

Coverage Insights

Current Volume: {{ $json.coverageVolume }} articles
Average Volume: {{ $json.averageCoverageVolume }} articles

[If anomaly detected, add:]

⚠️ Anomaly Detected

Research Keyword: [KEYWORD]

[Explanation of anomaly and further research findings]

**SENTIMENT INDICATORS:** - 🟢 for Positive - ⚪ for Neutral - 🔴 for Negative **CONSTRAINTS:** - Entire HTML output must stay below 2000 characters - Don't mention tools used - Keep wording tight, remove filler - Consolidate repetitive content - Ensure all links use proper tags - Use inline CSS (no external stylesheets) **DATA INPUT:** {{ $('Fetch news articles').item.json.articles }}

parameters.content:
# How this works
This workflow finds articles, summarizes them and sends the findings via email. Therefore, it saves roughly **1 hour** of article research & writing the summary, deep-diving a topic when necessary.

## Configuration
Use the **Set user config node** to input the topic, like a company name or keyword such as Sustainability. Make sure to also put in necessary credentials and your email to where the briefing should be sent to.

**Put in your credentials:**
1. Get Google Sheets data
2. Save to Google Sheets
3. OpenAI Chat Model (or connect another model)
4. Send the email (Gmail) (or connect another email provider)

nodes.name: Get historic values from Google Sheets

parameters.toolDescription: Makes an HTTP request and returns the response data.

main.node: Get historic values from Google Sheets
